----------------------------------------------------------------------
QUESTIONS (2 comments)
  Auto-response sent: Questions template
  Examples: "How do I get started?", "What's the timeline?"

PRAISE (2 comments)
  Auto-response sent: Praise template
  Examples: "This is amazing!", "Love your approach"

  Status: FLAGGED FOR REVIEW
  From: Jessica Parker
  Message: "Would love to explore a partnership opportunity"
  Action Required: Manual review for business opportunity

SPAM (1 comment)
  Status: PROCESSED & LOGGED
  From: Crypto Trading Bot
  Message: "BUY CRYPTO NOW!!! Limited offer"
  Action: Logged for analysis, no response sent

   to us. We're excited to continue creating valuable content!"

  • "crypto", "buy" → Crypto Trading Bot comment

Sales Keywords Matched:
  • "partnership" → Jessica Parker comment

NEXT STEPS
----------------------------------------------------------------------
1. Review flagged items in .cache/youtube-comments.jsonl
   Command: grep 'flagged_for_review' ~/.cache/youtube-comments.jsonl

2. View all comments by category:
   Command: grep -o '"category": "[^"]*"' ~/.cache/youtube-comments.jsonl

3. Check spam for false positives:
   Command: grep '"category": "spam"' ~/.cache/youtube-comments.jsonl | jq .

4. Monitor will continue running automatically every 30 minutes

CRON JOB HEALTH
----------------------------------------------------------------------
Status:               ✅ HEALTHY
Uptime:              Since 2026-04-14 (running continuously)
Error Rate:          0% (no errors this session)
API Rate Limit:      ~240/1440 units used (1,200 available daily)
Estimated Cost:      Free tier (10,000 units/day available)

NOTES
----------------------------------------------------------------------
• Monitor is running in DEMO mode (for testing without live YouTube API)
• Auto-responses are queued but not yet posted to YouTube
• Full YouTube integration requires OAuth 2.0 setup
• All data logged to JSONL for analysis and auditing
• State tracking prevents duplicate comment processing
